name: iShares S&P GSCI Commodity-Indexed Trust
summary: iShares S&P GSCI Commodity-Indexed Trust (GSG) is a Delaware statutory trust that issues shares representing fractional undivided beneficial interests in its net assets. The Trust holds long positions in exchange-traded index futures contracts on the S&P GSCI Excess Return Index, along with cash and U.S. Treasury securities as collateral, seeking to track the S&P GSCI Total Return Index before fees and expenses.
